logger.message: #[{ event: "SALESFORCE_OUTAGE", system: "salesforce", errorType: (error.errorType as String), description: (error.description default ""), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload
set-payload.value: #[{ status: "ERROR", system: "salesforce", message: "Salesforce service is unavailable. Please retry later.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]

logger.message: #[{ event: "DB_CONNECTIVITY_FAILURE", system: "database", errorType: (error.errorType as String), description: (error.description default ""), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload
set-payload.value: #[{ status: "ERROR", system: "database", message: "Database connection failed. Processing stopped.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]

logger.message: #[{ event: "JMS_UNAVAILABLE", system: "jms", errorType: (error.errorType as String), description: (error.description default ""), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload
set-payload.value: #[{ status: "ERROR", system: "jms", message: "Messaging system is unavailable.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: (now() as String) }]
